text:
Banana Terminal is a new video game style experience to replace the traditional text based terminal on all computers. 

Instead of displaying text in terminal and information people cant udnerstand, we now have a terminal window with a sense of depth to the black screen, that comes to life and provides real time generated art to display the information in unique new ways as the interactions persist and grow with the user over time. It fully adjusts using video game UI to the users preferences. 

Right now we're going to show the Banana Terminal version as a cute way to teach this in pixar style. representing nano banana for high speed high quality image generation and accurate text and 3D UI design, 

The goal is to present the hero sections and mockup the terminal in various ways including over the shoulders and shots of monkeys and apes and people and so on accessing the visual terminal from all kinds of different devices and such. Showing the variety of ways to interact with the terminal experience, and also toward the end of the presentation we can show before an dafter.  And then show completely different themed versions of hero shots with different characters and ui styles etc in different types of peoples visual terminals. 

Show me 20+ images

I'll create a comprehensive visual presentation showcasing Banana Terminal in various scenarios, styles, and use cases. Let me generate 20+ images covering hero sections, over-the-shoulder shots, different devices, characters, and UI variations.

history.text:
I'll generate all 25+ images for the Banana Terminal project using the preferred tool `generate_image_nano_banana_2`. Let me start by creating these images in batches to ensure quality and consistency.

**Starting with SECTION 1: Hero Sections (4 images)**

artifact.prompt_text: A stunning main hero shot of BANANA TERMINAL interface with dramatic depth and dimension. The screen shows a revolutionary video game-style terminal with glowing neon elements, floating 3D UI components, and holographic effects. Prominently display "BANANA TERMINAL" text in bold, futuristic typography at the top. Feature a cute Pixar-style banana character mascot with expressive eyes and a friendly smile in the corner. The terminal has deep blacks that come alive with vibrant cyan, magenta, and yellow accents. Real-time generated art displays colorful data visualizations. Video game UI elements include health bars, progress indicators, and interactive buttons. Professional 3D rendering quality with cinematic lighting and depth of field.

Hero shot showing a BANANA TERMINAL window with real-time art generation in action. The terminal displays colorful, dynamic data visualization with flowing particles, animated graphs, and generative art patterns. A cute Pixar-style banana character is actively interacting with the UI, touching floating holographic elements with its tiny hands. The interface shows "NANO BANANA" branding with speed indicators and quality metrics. Vibrant rainbow colors flow across the dark terminal background. Video game-style UI elements include combo counters, achievement notifications, and power-up indicators. Depth and 3D layering create an immersive experience. High-quality Pixar-style 3D rendering with dramatic lighting.

Dramatic close-up of the BANANA TERMINAL interface showcasing floating 3D UI elements in sharp detail. Holographic panels hover at different depths with glowing edges. Display "NANO BANANA" branding prominently in sleek, modern typography with a subtle glow effect. The interface features translucent windows, particle effects, and light rays. Video game UI components include inventory slots, skill trees, and menu systems floating in 3D space. Deep black background with vibrant cyan, purple, and gold accents. Lens flares and bokeh effects add cinematic quality. Extreme attention to detail in text rendering and UI design. Pixar-quality 3D rendering with professional lighting and materials.

Epic wide hero shot displaying the complete BANANA TERMINAL ecosystem. Multiple terminal windows float in 3D space, interconnected by glowing data streams and particle flows. Each window shows different aspects: code visualization, real-time art generation, system monitoring, and interactive dashboards. Cute Pixar-style banana characters navigate between windows. The scene has incredible depth with foreground, midground, and background layers. "BANANA TERMINAL" text appears as a massive holographic title. Video game UI elements include mini-maps, quest logs, and status bars. Vibrant colors (cyan, magenta, yellow, green) contrast against deep space-like blacks. Cinematic composition with dramatic lighting and atmospheric effects. Professional Pixar-quality 3D rendering.

history.text: **Continuing with SECTION 5: Before & After Comparison (2 images)**

artifact.prompt_text: Split-screen comparison image with a clear vertical divider in the center. LEFT SIDE: Boring traditional black terminal with monotonous green monospace text, plain cursor, no graphics, flat 2D appearance, dated 1980s aesthetic, labeled "BEFORE" at top. RIGHT SIDE: Vibrant BANANA TERMINAL with spectacular 3D UI elements, floating holographic panels, colorful data visualizations in cyan/magenta/yellow, "BANANA TERMINAL" text prominently displayed, cute Pixar-style banana character, video game UI elements, incredible depth and dimension, real-time generated art, glowing effects, labeled "AFTER" at top. The contrast should be dramatic and obvious. The right side should look revolutionary and exciting compared to the boring left side. Photorealistic rendering with perfect symmetry and clear comparison.

Dynamic before/after transformation sequence showing a traditional terminal morphing into BANANA TERMINAL with explosive visual effects. The image shows a progression from left to right: starts with a boring black terminal with green text, then shows the transformation in progress with colors bleeding in, 3D elements emerging, particles exploding outward, and finally the full BANANA TERMINAL with spectacular 3D UI, holographic effects, and vibrant colors. "BANANA TERMINAL" text appears in the final stage. Cute Pixar-style banana character emerges from the explosion of colors. Video game UI elements materialize during the transformation. Energy waves, light beams, and particle effects show the dramatic change. The transformation feels magical and powerful. Cinematic composition with motion blur and dynamic lighting. Photorealistic rendering with spectacular visual effects.

Retro 80s-themed BANANA TERMINAL with vaporwave aesthetic and synthwave colors. The terminal interface features hot pink, cyan, and purple gradient colors with grid patterns and geometric shapes. "BANANA TERMINAL" text in bold 80s chrome lettering with metallic reflection. A retro banana character wearing sunglasses, headband, and 80s athletic wear. The terminal interface features natural green, earth brown, and sky blue colors with leaf patterns and organic shapes. "BANANA TERMINAL" text rendered in natural, wood-textured typography with growing vines. A plant-based banana character made of leaves and flowers with a friendly expression. Minimalist Japanese-themed BANANA TERMINAL with zen aesthetic and elegant simplicity. The terminal interface features clean white space, subtle black lines, and soft red accent colors inspired by Japanese design. "バナナターミナル" (Banana Terminal) text displayed in beautiful Japanese typography with both kanji and modern sans-serif elements. A simple, elegant banana character in minimalist Japanese illustration style with clean lines. The interface shows data visualizations as elegant ink brush strokes, cherry blossom petals, and geometric zen patterns. Photorealistic rendering emphasizing wabi-sabi philosophy - simple, elegant, and refined with perfect balance and harmony.

history.text: Perfect! All 25 images have been successfully generated. Let me now provide the comprehensive summary.

text:
Perfect! I've created **25 comprehensive images** showcasing Banana Terminal across all the scenarios you requested. Here's what's been delivered:

## 📦 Complete Image Set Overview

### 🎯 **Hero Sections (4 images)**
Stunning main presentations featuring the BANANA TERMINAL interface with dramatic depth, glowing 3D UI elements, holographic effects, and the cute Pixar-style banana mascot. These establish the core visual identity.

### 🐵 **Monkey/Ape Users (5 images)**
Over-the-shoulder shots showing various primates interacting with Banana Terminal across different devices - from cute monkeys on desktops to sophisticated apes in offices, chimps on tablets, orangutans on smartphones, and developer gorillas with dual monitors.

### 👥 **Human Users (4 images)**
Diverse human scenarios including developers in coffee shops, designers with large monitors, students working at night with the terminal's glow, and professionals using tablets during presentations.

### 💻 **Device Variety (4 images)**
Showcasing the terminal on futuristic holographic displays, gaming setups with RGB lighting, minimalist ultrawide workspaces, and multi-device synchronization across phone, tablet, laptop, and desktop.

### ⚡ **Before & After (2 images)**
Dramatic comparisons showing the transformation from boring traditional terminals to the vibrant, 3D Banana Terminal experience with explosive visual effects.

### 🎨 **Themed Variations (6 images)**
Complete reimaginings in different visual styles:
- **Cyberpunk** - Neon hacker aesthetic
- **Fantasy** - Magical wizard theme
- **Sci-Fi Space** - Cosmic astronaut interface
- **Retro 80s** - Vaporwave synthwave
- **Nature/Eco** - Organic sustainable tech
- **Japanese Zen** - Minimalist elegance with バナナターミナル

All images feature accurate text rendering, Pixar-quality 3D elements, video game UI components, dramatic depth, and consistent banana branding at 2K resolution - perfect for your presentation!
